channel.title: PIAI Teams News — 📄 Papers
channel.description: 📄 Papers — AI research from Hugging Face Daily Papers

item.title: Context-Aware RL for Agentic and Multimodal LLMs
item.description: ContextRL enhances long-horizon reasoning and multimodal performance through reinforcement learning that rewards context selection for supporting query-answer pairs, achieving improvements over standard methods on diver…

item.title: Moebius: 0.2B Lightweight Image Inpainting Framework with 10B-Level Performance
item.description: A lightweight image inpainting framework achieves high-fidelity results with significantly reduced parameters and inference time through novel local-global interaction blocks and adaptive distillation strategies.

item.title: Playful Agentic Robot Learning
item.description: Embodied robots learn reusable skills through self-directed play and exploration, then apply these skills to improve performance on downstream tasks without additional training.

item.title: Beyond Static Leaderboards: Predictive Validity for the Evaluation of LLM Agents
item.description: Aggregate-score leaderboards in agent benchmarks fail to capture deployment-relevant dimensions and show rank instability, necessitating new evaluation frameworks based on predictive validity and out-of-distribution cri…

item.title: Multi-LCB: Extending LiveCodeBench to Multiple Programming Languages
item.description: Multi-LCB addresses the limitation of LiveCodeBench by providing a multi-language benchmark for evaluating LLMs across twelve programming languages while maintaining contamination controls and evaluation protocols.

item.title: FlowBender: Feedback-Aware Training for Self-Correcting Conditional Flows
item.description: FlowBender is a closed-loop framework that addresses constraint satisfaction in diffusion and flow models by training networks to correct alignment errors using inference-time feedback, outperforming traditional supervi…

item.title: DF3DV-1K: A Large-Scale Dataset and Benchmark for Distractor-Free Novel View Synthesis
item.description: A large-scale real-world dataset called DF3DV-1K is introduced to address the lack of clean and cluttered image sets for distractor-free radiance field research, containing 1,048 scenes with 89,924 images across 128 dis…

item.title: S-Agent: Spatial Tool-Use Elicits Reasoning for Spatial Intelligence
item.description: S-Agent is a spatial reasoning framework that enhances visual language models with temporal memory and hierarchical spatial tools to enable continuous 3D world understanding from multi-view imagery.

item.title: DragMesh-2: Physically Plausible Dexterous Hand-Object Interaction with Articulated Objects
item.description: DragMesh-2 enables dexterous hand-object interaction through contact-driven manipulation, with PICA enhancing robustness under varying contact loads without tactile feedback.

item.title: No Resource, No Benchmarks, No Problem? Evaluating and Improving LLMs for Code Generation in No-Resource Languages
item.description: Research addresses code generation challenges for no-resource programming languages by developing benchmarks and proposing a method that combines further pre-training with weight difference transfer to create specialize…

item.title: Taylor-Calibrate: Principled Initialization for Hybrid Linear Attention Distillation
item.description: Hybrid linear attention models can be improved through a novel initialization technique that enhances conversion from pretrained Transformers by leveraging teacher attention statistics and alignment steps.

item.title: JanusMesh: Fast and Zero-Shot 3D Visual Illusion Generation via Cross-Space Denoising
item.description: A fast, training-free framework generates text-driven 3D visual illusions by decoupling generation into cross-space dual-branch denoising and view-conditioned texture synthesis for seamless geometric fusion and semantic…

item.title: FAPO: Fully Autonomous Prompt Optimization of Multi-Step LLM Pipelines
item.description: FAPO optimizes LLM pipelines by combining prompt editing with structural changes, demonstrating superior performance across multiple benchmarks and security tasks.

item.title: Thinking with Visual Grounding
item.description: Visually grounded thinking integrates natural-language reasoning with explicit visual evidence grounding in vision-language models, improving reasoning accuracy through scalable synthesis and reinforcement learning tech…

item.title: Understanding the Behaviors of Environment-aware Information Retrieval
item.description: Large language models can be trained via reinforcement learning to adapt query formulation strategies for different retrievers, with distinct optimal query styles and improved performance through retriever-specific guid…

item.title: LedgerAgent: Structured State for Policy-Adherent Tool-Calling Agents
item.description: LEDGERAGENT is a method for customer service agents that maintains task states in a separate ledger to improve policy adherence and state management during tool calling.

item.title: ImageWAM: Do World Action Models Really Need Video Generation, or Just Image Editing?
item.description: ImageWAM demonstrates that pretrained image editing models can effectively replace video generation in world action models for robot control, achieving better performance with reduced computational costs.

item.title: HumanScale: Egocentric Human Video Can Outperform Real-Robot Data for Embodied Pretraining
item.description: Egocentric human video can effectively replace teleoperated robot trajectories for embodied model pretraining, achieving better performance with reduced data collection costs.

item.title: The Data Manifold under the Microscope
item.description: A benchmarking framework is introduced to study data-manifold geometry by extending dSprites and COIL-20 datasets with additional transformation dimensions and dense sampling, enabling accurate estimation of curvature,…

item.title: Rethinking Shrinkage Bias in LLM FP4 Pretraining: Geometric Origin, Systemic Impact, and UFP4 Recipe
item.description: Uniform 4-bit training with RHT-based quantization outperforms E2M1-based methods by eliminating shrinkage bias and improving training stability across large language model architectures.

item.title: FreeStyle: Free Control of Style-Content Dual-Reference Generation from Community LoRA Mining
item.description: FreeStyle is a scalable dual-reference generation framework that uses community LoRA mining to create large-scale style-content triplets while addressing content leakage through disentanglement mechanisms and a comprehe…

item.title: Duration Aware Scheduling for ASR Serving Under Workload Drift
item.description: Duration-aware scheduling policies improve ASR serving latency by leveraging audio length as a predictor for processing time, with SJF and HRRN algorithms showing significant median latency reductions while maintaining…

item.title: Current World Models Lack a Persistent State Core
item.description: Current world models fail to maintain consistent world states when unobserved, indicating a need for design changes that prioritize physical state stability over appearance fidelity.

item.title: The FID Lottery: Quantifying Hidden Randomness in Generative-Model Evaluation
item.description: Analysis of FID variance across different training and sampling seeds reveals significant reproducibility issues in image generation evaluation, with retraining causing larger fluctuations than resampling, and recommend…

item.title: LegalHalluLens: Typed Hallucination Auditing and Calibrated Multi-Agent Debate for Trustworthy Legal AI
item.description: LegalHalluLens audits AI systems in legal workflows by identifying specific error patterns and directional biases in hallucinations across different claim types, enabling more reliable deployment through targeted diagno…

item.title: ENPIRE: Agentic Robot Policy Self-Improvement in the Real World
item.description: ENPIRE framework enables autonomous robotics research through a closed-loop system that automates policy improvement via environment feedback, policy refinement, and evolutionary code optimization.

item.title: Freeing the Law with LOCUS: A Local Ordinance Corpus for the United States
item.description: A comprehensive corpus and access layer for U.S. local ordinance codes has been developed to enable machine-readable legal AI research, addressing the lack of authoritative legal text at scale for local regulations.

item.title: Configurable Clinical Information Extraction with Agentic RAG: What Works, What Breaks, and Why
item.description: ACIE, an agentic RAG system deployed in a clinical setting, demonstrates high accuracy in extracting medical information from complex patient contexts, achieving 96.5% acceptance rate by nuclear-medicine physicians acro…

item.title: Adaptive Volumetric Mechanical Property Fields Invariant to Resolution
item.description: AdaVoMP predicts dense spatially-varying mechanical properties for 3D objects using a sparse adaptive voxel structure and transformer encoder-decoder model, enabling realistic deformable simulations with improved accura…

item.title: Selective Synergistic Learning for Video Object-Centric Learning
item.description: Selective Synergistic Learning (SSync) addresses limitations in video object-centric learning by selectively distilling reliable cues through pseudo-labeling and transitive merging to improve object decomposition qualit…

item.title: ReSyn: A Generalized Recursive Regular Expression Synthesis Framework
item.description: A divide-and-conquer framework named ReSyn enhances regex synthesis accuracy by decomposing complex problems, combined with a parameter-efficient synthesizer called Set2Regex that handles example permutation invariance.

item.title: Holo-World: Unified Camera, Object and Weather Control for Video World Model
item.description: A unified controllable video world model generates videos from a single image while preserving scene structure and transferring to target weather states through specialized parameterization and conditioning techniques.

item.title: LooseControlVideo: Directorial Video Control using Spatial Blocking
item.description: LooseControlVideo enables intuitive 3D spatial control in text-to-video generation using sparse oriented 3D boxes as proxies, achieving superior trajectory accuracy and occlusion handling compared to existing methods.

item.title: JAMER: Project-Level Code Framework Dataset and Benchmark on Professional Game Engines
item.description: Game development frameworks and benchmarks were created using data from game jam competitions to evaluate code generation and project-level programming capabilities.
